infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KaTalk uses the camera only when you join a video match.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KaTalk uses the microphone only when you join a voice room or video match.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KaTalk uses your location to show nearby members by distance.

plugins.cameraPermission: KaTalk uses your camera only for video matches.
plugins.microphonePermission: KaTalk uses your microphone only for voice rooms and video matches.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: KaTalk uses your location to show nearby members by distance.
